report_name: Industrial Sector Most Targeted by Ransomware, NCC Group Report Warns

threat_actors.name: Ransomware Groups
threat_actors.description: A general classification for various ransomware groups that have been identified as relentlessly targeting the industrial and Operational Technology (OT) sectors between March 2025 and March 2026. These groups exploit IT/OT convergence to cause physical disruption and increase the likelihood of ransom payment.
threat_actors.goals: To cause physical disruption in OT environments to coerce victims into paying a ransom.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Used as a typical initial access vector to compromise the less-secure IT network of industrial organizations.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: Used as an initial access vector by exploiting public-facing IT systems to gain entry into the corporate network.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts
attack_patterns.description: Used for lateral movement from the IT network to the OT network by logging into a system that bridges the two environments, such as a jump box or HMI, with compromised credentials.

attack_patterns.name: Remote System Discovery
attack_patterns.description: Used within the OT network to identify PLCs, RTUs, and other control devices for subsequent impact.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: Used to encrypt data on HMIs and engineering workstations within the OT environment to cause disruption.

attack_patterns.name: Manipulation of Control
attack_patterns.description: Used as an impact technique to manipulate control logic on devices like PLCs to halt production or create unsafe physical conditions.

tools.name: mstsc.exe
tools.description: The Remote Desktop Protocol client, mstsc.exe, was noted as an observable, likely used for lateral movement and remote access between IT and OT systems.

identities.name: Industrial Sector
identities.description: The most targeted sector for ransomware attacks between March 2025 and March 2026, suffering 2,073 documented incidents.

identities.name: Capital Goods Manufacturing
identities.description: The most targeted sub-sector within the industrial vertical, with 1,192 ransomware attacks.

identities.name: Machinery Industry
identities.description: A top targeted industry within the industrial sector, experiencing 442 ransomware attacks.

identities.name: Construction/Engineering Industry
identities.description: A top targeted industry within the industrial sector, experiencing 394 ransomware attacks.

indicators.name: mstsc.exe Execution
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: MSTSC Execution
id: 7f5b8f5e-1a3c-4d8a-9e6b-0f1c2d3e4a5b
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of mstsc.exe, the Microsoft Terminal Services Client, which can be used for legitimate remote access but is also frequently abused by attackers for lateral movement.
references:
  - https://www.nccgroup.com/uk/about-us/newsroom-and-events/press-releases/2026/operational-technology-faces-heightened-cyber-risk-with-the-industrials-sector-experiencing-thousands-of-attacks-per-year-warns-ncc-group/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-13
tags:
  - attack.t1021.001
level: low
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\mstsc.exe'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the execution of the Remote Desktop client, which could indicate lateral movement activity.

indicators.name: SMB Traffic from IT to OT Network
indicators.pattern:
title: SMB Traffic Detected on OT Network Boundary
id: c4d5e6f7-a8b9-4012-cdef-123456789012
status: experimental
description: Detects SMB traffic (TCP port 445) which could indicate lateral movement from an IT network to a sensitive OT network. This rule should be deployed on sensors monitoring IT/OT network boundaries.
references:
  - https://www.nccgroup.com/uk/about-us/newsroom-and-events/press-releases/2026/operational-technology-faces-heightened-cyber-risk-with-the-industrials-sector-experiencing-thousands-of-attacks-per-year-warns-ncc-group/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-13
tags:
  - attack.t1021.002
level: medium
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    DestinationPort: 445
    Protocol: 'tcp'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects Server Message Block (SMB) traffic, which could be indicative of lateral movement from an IT network into an OT environment.

relationships.source_name: SMB Traffic from IT to OT Network
